summary: Iteration 218: Tested 5 fixes + multi-pillar intent + Mira OS routing. All 6 feature areas PASSED. 15/15 backend tests pass. Frontend: Go/Play desktop pages load with personalized Mojo content. Shop mobile renders with breed-matched products. CartSidebar shows breed-safe 'Mira Also Recommends' (no Akita). Memory API CRUD fully functional. Multi-pillar intent returns 2+ pillars for compound requests. /mira-os → MiraDemoPage (restored). /mira-os-shell → MiraOSPage.

minor.issue: Multiple 404s and 'TypeError: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' in MiraOSPage.jsx — page renders correctly but some API calls fail silently. Pre-existing issue not introduced by current fixes.

action_items: MiraOSPage.jsx (/mira-os-shell): Fix 'body stream already read' TypeError — likely same response being .json()-parsed multiple times in concurrent fetch calls. Check ~lines 1893, 1920, 1943, 1965, 1989 in MiraOSPage.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: MiraOSPage.jsx: 'TypeError: Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' — response object is being consumed twice. Need to either clone the response (response.clone().json()) or ensure each response is read only once.

GoSoulPage.jsx line 939: allocates allRaw from apiProducts but the variable `allergies` (line 939) references outer scope `allergies` which is not defined in DimExpanded function scope — this appears to work because of JS closure but could cause subtle bugs if allergies is undefined. Not blocking but worth reviewing.

applyMiraFilter + filterBreedProducts confirmed imported and used in all 4 required files: GoSoulPage.jsx (line 45, 921), PlaySoulPage.jsx (line 40, 877), ShopMobilePage.jsx (line 14, 61-63), CartSidebar.jsx (line 14, 43-44)

fix_results.fix1_go_desktop_applyMiraFilter: PASS - /go at 1280px: Loads with personalized 'Travel & Go for Mojo'. Trip profile shows Indie breed, Goa, chicken allergy. filterBreedProducts + applyMiraFilter confirmed imported at line 45 and used at line 921.
fix_results.fix1_play_desktop_applyMiraFilter: PASS - /play at 1280px: Loads with personalized 'Activity Profile' for Mojo. filterBreedProducts + applyMiraFilter confirmed at line 40 and 877.
fix_results.fix2_shop_mobile_mira_filter: PASS - /shop at 390px: Shows 'Shop for Mojo · Indie · 5,358 breed-matched products'. Mira knows everything tagline visible. No console errors.
fix_results.fix3_cart_sidebar_breed_filter: PASS - CartSidebar 'Mira also recommends for Mojo' shows salmon biscuits/feast bowl (breed-appropriate). Zero Akita products visible for Indie dog. filterBreedProducts + applyMiraFilter confirmed in CartSidebar lines 43-44.
fix_results.fix5_memory_api_get: PASS - GET /api/mira/memory/mem_test_001 returns messages, preferences, service_interests, concierge_requests fields
fix_results.fix5_memory_api_delete: PASS - DELETE /api/mira/memory/{pet_id} clears conversation, verified with subsequent GET returning empty messages
fix_results.multi_pillar_intent: PASS - POST /api/mira/detect-intent with 'birthday walk AND grooming session' returns pillars array with 2+ pillars each with confidence>=40. Response includes primary_pillar, display_text fields.
fix_results.mira_os_routing: PASS - /mira-os → MiraDemoPage (dark purple, orb with dog photo, 'Ask Mira anything...' input). /mira-os-shell → MiraOSPage (tab nav: Mojo/Today/Picks/Services/Insights/Learn/Concierge)

seed_data_creation: Created/deleted mem_test_001 memory entry for testing (cleaned up via DELETE endpoint)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 fixes from this session tested and passing. Fix 1 (Go/Play applyMiraFilter) confirmed in code and UI. Fix 2 (Shop mobile) confirmed. Fix 3 (CartSidebar breed filter) shows correct salmon-only products, no Akita for Indie Mojo. Fix 5 (Memory API) CRUD fully working. Multi-pillar intent (2+ pillars) working. /mira-os → MiraDemoPage restored. Known non-blocking issue: MiraOSPage.jsx (/mira-os-shell) has 'body stream already read' TypeError on some API calls. BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx from iteration 217 was NOT retested in this session - still potentially broken (check iteration_217.json for context).

mira_os_shell_json_error.root_cause: Multiple fetch calls are consuming the same response object more than once. When using promise chains like .then(res => res.json()), if the response is also used in a .then(r => { ... r.json() ... }) chain, the body stream is already consumed.
mira_os_shell_json_error.fix: Use response.clone() before reading body twice, or ensure each fetch response is only read once
